title: hieracium murorum subsp. sparsellidens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sparsellidens, also known as a subspecies of the lesser hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family with small yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. sparsellidens include its ability to support kidney function, reduce swelling and pain, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and infusing the leaves and flowers, and can be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures and salves.
